About Organization

AIIMS (All India Institute of Medical Science) is a premier medical institute in India.

As per official notification, AIIMS is responsible for conducting the NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment 2026.

About the Programme

The AIIMS NORCET Nursing Officer 11th Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment process for nursing officers in AIIMS.

The programme aims to select eligible candidates for the post of nursing officers in AIIMS.
